root.speaker: Old Neil
root.text: Forgive the dust, friend. I keep to myself these days. Was there something you needed?

options.label: Who is the woman in the portrait?

celeste.speaker: Old Neil
celeste.text: Celeste. My betrothed. A fever took her, a long time ago now. They tell me to let her rest — they do not understand how close I am.

work.speaker: Old Neil
work.text: An old man's hobbies. Glass and salts and patience. Nothing to trouble a guest with. Only — mind your step. The chalk is still wet.

root.speaker: Nighthawk
root.text: You there. You have the look of someone who woke up in the wrong life. Speak quickly — the fog has ears.

options.label: That face in the mirror wasn't mine.

who.speaker: Nighthawk
who.text: A watchman of the dark. We hunt what the Church is too proud to admit walks these streets.

org.speaker: Nighthawk
org.text: The Nighthawks answer to no parish. The Church of Evernight already moves on the notebook — and on whoever carries it.

notebook.speaker: Nighthawk
notebook.text: So you HAVE seen it. Antigonus' notebook. Keep it hidden, or it will hollow you out and wear you like a coat.

mirror.speaker: Nighthawk
mirror.text: Transmigration. The previous tenant didn't leave willingly. Whatever pulled you here wanted this body in the city — tonight.

effects.text: 线索：查清这具身体的前主人 (Learn who wore this body before you).

root.speaker: Nighthawk Captain
root.text: So you're the one the street watch flagged. Sit. You carry Antigonus' notebook, and that makes you the most hunted soul in Tingen tonight.

options.label: What do you need from me?

who.speaker: Nighthawk Captain
who.text: Watchmen against the things the Church buries. We don't answer to the parish, and right now we're the only reason you're still breathing.

charge.speaker: Nighthawk Captain
charge.text: That notebook is a key the Church of Evernight will kill to claim. Antigonus wrote it — and the University archives still hold his name. Go there. Learn who he was before the Church learns where you are.

effects.text: 线索：前往廷根大学档案馆，查清安提哥努斯其人 (Search the Tingen University archives for Antigonus).

root.speaker: Orin the Lamplighter
root.text: Keep your voice down. The others are at the warehouse already, setting the circle. I'm only the lookout. That's all I am.

options.label: [Persuade] You don't have to go through with this.

rite.speaker: Orin the Lamplighter
rite.text: Something that descends. Voss calls it a god; the chalk and the salt and the marked one are just the door. I lit the candles myself. God help me, I lit them.

effects.text: 线索：教徒在铁十字仓库布置降临法阵 (The cult is laying the descent circle at the Iron Cross warehouse).

turned.speaker: Orin the Lamplighter
turned.text: ...You're right. I won't carry their lamp another night. Tell me what to do — I'll point them the wrong way, slow the salt, whatever it takes.

options.label: Stay quiet and wait for my signal.

root.speaker: Ledger Finch
root.text: (He looks up sharply, ink-stained fingers going still on a ledger.) Oh — the records desk is closed for cataloguing just now. Mostly. Was there something you needed? Please, be quick about it.

options.label: What happened to the restricted volume?

antigonus.speaker: Ledger Finch
antigonus.text: Antigonus...? (He stiffens.) That name belongs to the restricted collection. I really couldn't say. The catalogue is over there if you must — but the section is sealed. Please don't make trouble for me.

volume.speaker: Ledger Finch
volume.text: The restricted volume? It's out — out for rebinding. At the bindery. Routine, entirely routine. (He answers a shade too fast, eyes flicking to the gap on the shelf.) It will be back any day now. Any day.
